title: Formatting, Style, and Editor Consistency · Policy Clinic: Editorconfig
summary: Create one fast deterministic formatting path for code and configuration. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates editorconfig increment in a zero-diff formatting gate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use editor-independent whitespace, newline, and charset settings.
Separate local write mode from CI check-only mode.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:

steps.title: Build Editorconfig evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-editorconfig-dwxt0t: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Editorconfig into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-editorconfig-dwxt0t:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
